meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome can't deploy apps. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Claude Code Setup: Deploy Your First AI App (Student Guide)
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with deployment. Use this intermediate guide to master Claude Code and Antigravity for seamless, professional-grade AI app launches.
content.answer_block: Deploying apps fails when environment configurations and deployment scripts are mismatched. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you automate the infrastructure-as-code layer. This setup bridges the gap between local development and cloud production, ensuring your code is deployment-ready, architecturally sound, and validated against industry-standard security and performance benchmarks.
content.intro:
You have spent weeks perfecting your logic, tuning your prompts, and polishing the UI, only to hit a brick wall: the deployment graveyard. The moment you push to production, the environment drifts, dependencies break, and your project stalls. It is the silent killer of student passion projects and the primary reason your portfolio remains invisible to recruiters.

But the gap between a local prototype and a live, scalable application isn't talent—it's tooling. By mastering the synergy between Claude Code and Antigravity, you stop manual debugging and start orchestrating production-ready environments. This is your path to moving beyond 'it works on my machine' to 'it scales in the cloud.'

steps.title: Initialize Environment Context
steps.description: Establish a clean state by mapping your project dependencies and environment variables to ensure Claude Code understands your infrastructure constraints.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current project directory and generate a robust environment configuration checklist for deployment to a standard cloud provider.

steps.title: Automated Dependency Audit
steps.description: Use Claude Code to scan your package.json or requirements.txt for version conflicts that typically cause deployment crashes.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review my project dependencies for security vulnerabilities and potential conflicts that could break during a CI/CD build process.

steps.title: Infrastructure-as-Code Templating
steps.description: Generate reliable deployment manifests so your infrastructure is defined as code, not manual configuration.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Dockerfile and a basic CI/CD pipeline script optimized for a Node.js/Python AI backend deployment.

steps.title: Build Integration Testing
steps.description: Simulate the production build process locally to catch environment-specific failures before they hit the server.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a test suite that mocks the production environment variables and validates that the app boots successfully.

steps.title: Final Deployment Validation
steps.description: Execute the final build and verify that all service endpoints are exposed correctly for public access.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a final verification script that pings my app's health check endpoint and reports any latency or connection issues.

pro_tips: Always use a .env.example file; never let Claude Code commit your actual API keys to the repository.
Use Claude Code's 'review' command on your deployment scripts to catch hardcoded paths that break on different OS environments.
Implement a 'smoke test' step in your pipeline that checks for specific AI model response codes before declaring a successful deployment.
Leverage Antigravity to generate documentation for your repo; recruiters prioritize projects that are well-documented and easy to run.
Keep your Claude Code context window lean by ignoring large binary files in your .claudeignore file to speed up analysis.
resources: Deployment Best Practices for AI: https://vercel.com/docs/deployments
content.next_steps: Once your first deployment is live, focus on setting up monitoring tools like Sentry or LogRocket to track how real users interact with your AI agents in production.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools and the roadmap. The only thing missing is the commit history that proves your expertise to future employers. Stop waiting for the 'perfect' code and start shipping your vision today. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
